bullets.text: Delivered React and TypeScript interfaces, internal dashboards and Node.js API integrations for remote e-commerce and growth workflows.
Automated recurring reporting and QA checks, centralising release visibility and reducing manual review.
Translated stakeholder requirements into scoped tasks, implementation updates and reviewable product releases across a remote team.
Built responsive web features and REST-connected backend workflows across client applications, APIs and databases.
Investigated defects, documented technical workflows and supported Git, QA triage and release handoffs in a consultancy environment.

housefair.title: HouseFair - Shared-Living Full-Stack Product
housefair.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Supabase Auth/PostgreSQL/RLS, Zod, Playwright, PWA
bullets: Designed and deployed an installable household workspace for recurring chores, groceries, shared expenses and calmer issue workflows.
Enforced server-resolved household membership with PostgreSQL RLS as a second boundary; 12 mobile Playwright checks pass across Android and iPhone PWA viewports.

theory.title: Irish Theory Test Coach - Live Deployed EdTech Platform
theory.stack: JavaScript, Vercel Functions, PostgreSQL adapters, passwordless sessions, PWA, accessibility and deployment QA
bullets: Designed and deployed irishtheorycoach.ie, an independent Category B practice platform with 1,277 questions, timed mocks, road-sign drills, weak-area review and account-access flows.
Built serverless APIs, protected learner/operator routes, content-quality checks, accessibility coverage and a 15-check post-deploy smoke suite for the public release.

roster.title: Roster Command - Workforce Scheduling Engineering Extract
roster.stack: TypeScript, Vitest, synthetic fixtures, deterministic domain modelling, GitHub Actions
bullets: Published selected, sanitised scheduling logic from a private roster system without employer, employee or client data.
Hardened overlap, overnight and multi-day shifts, lifecycle restrictions, deterministic cover ranking and same-name employee matching; 23 tests pass.

qa_lab.title: QA Automation Lab - Browser and API Release Contracts
qa_lab.stack: Playwright, TypeScript, APIRequestContext, axe-core, fixtures, page objects, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built 26 browser and API contracts covering portfolio evidence, live read-only product boundaries and an isolated writable workflow target.
Separated smoke and negative checks from opt-in writes using stable role locators, fixtures, route interception, accessibility checks, traces, screenshots and HTML reports.
